Place your 18x18 effect icon texture here as:
  dark_sight.png

And the dark sight vignette (full-screen darkness texture) as:
  dark_sight_vignette.png  (1024x1024 transparent edges, dark center optional)

You can generate these with any image editor (Aseprite, GIMP, Photoshop).
- dark_sight.png: a red eye icon, 18x18 pixels
- dark_sight_vignette.png: a PNG with dark vignette for overlay (optional, the code also draws it programmatically)

Note: the effect icon must be at:
  assets/huntmod/textures/mob_effect/dark_sight.png
